name: Hank Thompson

current_profile.summary: VP of Operations with industrial engineering background. Leads lean/Six Sigma programs, ERP rollouts, and process improvements. Familiar with IoT/automation concepts but limited ML knowledge.
current_profile.ai_experience: Familiar with IoT/automation concepts, limited ML knowledge

learning_intent: Wants to lead AI transformation (predictive maintenance, demand forecasting, quality inspection). Goal: become AI-literate enough to scope projects, partner with technical teams, and drive change management.

target_jd.title: AI Strategy Leader (Operations / Smart Factory)
requirements: Identify high-ROI AI use cases in operations; prioritize roadmap and pilots
Ensure data readiness and integration across OT/IT systems
Define KPIs and governance for AI deployments; scale successful pilots
Communicate benefits and manage workforce impacts of AI adoption

expected_skill_gaps.description: Understand ML concepts, model limitations, and how AI differs from deterministic automation.
High-level data pipeline and cloud primitives; basics of APIs and system integration.
Monitoring, incident response concepts, and deployment gates (at a leadership level).
Facilitate AI workshops and align cross-functional teams on AI roadmaps.
AI use case selection and ROI measurement.
